login.title: Sales & Customer Management

login.heroBadge: V3RII SalesDesk · Customers, stock, sales, invoices and field ops in one platform
login.heroTagline: End-to-end sales management from field to office for Turkish businesses.
login.heroTitle: Your entire business flow in one
login.heroDescription: Unify quotes, invoices, stock and visit forms on one screen. One data source for the whole team.
login.flowTitle: End-to-end flow from sales to field
login.flowSubtitle: Modules work together; data stays in one hub.
login.diff2: Visit forms, reports and weekly plan together
login.diff3: Live rates, notifications and team permissions

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to reset your password. We will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: A password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox (including spam).
forgotPassword.failed: The request could not be completed. Check your email address and try again.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send the password reset request. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid or missing token. Please check the reset link.
resetPassword.successRedirect: Your password has been reset. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.error: An error occurred during password reset.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.newPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.newPasswordMaxLength: New password must be at most 100 characters
validation.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as the current password
validation.requiredFieldsNotFilled: Required fields are not filled in.
